ab: kemuda yu druwa?
en: A: How did you get here?

ab: kemakawang ku druwa.
en: I came on foot.

ab: muisatr yu dra manay druwa?
en: A: What kind of car did you take?

ab: muisatr ku dra bas druwa.
en: B: I came by bus.

ab: kemuda yu muka i kiyukay?
en: A: How do you go to church?

ab: pakakawang dra palidring puisatr kanku i namalri.
en: B: Dad drove me with him.

ab: kana wawariwari i, kemuda muka i takesian taytaw?
en: A: How does he usually go to school?

ab: muisatr kana ciyē-yun muka i takesian taytaw.
en: B: He took the subway to school.

ab: kemuda muka tremimaa dra kulang i temumu na babayan?
en: A: How does your grandmother go to the grocery store?

ab: miutubay taytaw muka tremimaa dra kulang.
en: B: She went to the grocery store on a motorcycle.

ab: kakuda yu muka i Butrulr?
en: A: How are you going to get to Orchid Island?

ab: uwaisatr ku dra tamina muka i Butrulr.
en: B: I want to take a boat to Lanyu.

ab: kakuda muka i Butrulr taytaw?
en: A: How did he get to Orchid Island?

ab: muisatr dra hikuki muka i Butrulr taytaw.
en: B: He took a plane to Orchid Island.

ab: muisatr dra manay taytaw muka i Takaw?
en: A: What bus did he take to Kaohsiung?

ab: muisatr kana pakesup na igiw muka i Takaw.
en: B: He took the THSR to Kaohsiung.

ab: a muisatr dra igiw muka i Balangaw taytaw?
en: A: Did he take a train to Taitung?

ab: aiwa! muisatr dra igiw muka i Balangaw taytaw.
en: B: Yes, he took a train to Taitung.

ab: a muisatr dra igiw muka i Balangaw taytaw?
en: A: Did he take a train to Taitung?

ab: amelri! muisatr dra hikuki muka i Balangaw taytaw.
en: B: No, he took a plane to Taitung.

ab: ulraya a uwaisatran dra bas kadrini?
en: A: Is there a bus stop near here?

ab: ulraya! munguwayayan ta kemakawang i, nanau yu dra uwaisatran dra bas.
ch: B:有，往前走就會看到公車站了。
en: B: Yes, if you go straight ahead, you will see the bus stop.

ab: ulraya isuwa na maraadalredalrep kadrini na ciyē-yun-can?
ch: A:離這裡最近的捷運站在哪裡?
en: A: Where is the nearest MRT station?

ab: uniyan dra ciyē-yun-can kadrini. mawmau karuwa yu muisatr dra ki-ting-siya.
ch: B:這裡沒有捷運站，你只能坐計程車。
en: B: There is no MRT station here, you can only take a taxi.

ab: muisatr dra bas karuwa munuma waluwan raredek i takesian?
en: A:How long does it take to get to the school by bus?

ab: muketrep misama dra lruwatra trektrek raredek i takesian.
en: B:15 minutes to school.

ab: muisatr kana pakesup na igiw karuwa munuma waluwan raredek i Tay-cong?
ch: A:搭高鐵要多久時間會到臺中?
en: A: How long does it take to get to Taichung by THSR?

ab: saya waluwan raredek i Tay-cong.
en: B: I will come to Taichung in an hour.

ab: pakakawang dra palidring muka i U-lay i, kapaetreng?
en: A: Is it a long drive to Ulai?

ab: karuwa saya waluwan.
en: B: It takes about an hour.

ab: karuwa munuma waluwan an muisatr yu dra ciyē-yun druwa kaniyam ruma?
ch: A:你搭捷運來我家要多久?
en: A: How long did it take you to come to my house by subway?

ab: karuwa makabetraan trektrek.
en: B: It takes 20 minutes.

ab: saigu yu muisatr dra didinsiya?
en: A: Do you know how to ride a bicycle?

ab: saigu ku muisatr dra didinsiya.
en: B: I can ride a bicycle.

ab: ulraya nu utubay?
en: A: Do you have a motorcycle?

ab: ulraya ku utubay a saya.
en: B: I have a motorcycle.

ab: ulraya nu utubay?
en: A: Do you have a motorcycle?

ab: uniyan ku dra utubay.
en: B: I don't have a motorcycle.
